---
pagetitle: "Event — chen.ist"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html">
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
---

Redirecting to [event](/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html)...
